memory:memory/2026-04-11.md:1:20.snippet: # 2026-04-11 Daily Journal ## 1) What Got Done - **Model switch:** Moved main agent from Kimi K2.5 → GLM-5.1 (Aaron noticed improvement in sharpness/reasoning) - **GhostJob market research:** Full competitive landscape deep-dive — identified 7 competitors, market sizing, and signal analysis - **Signal research:** Analyzed what makes good vs bad ghost job signals, drawing from Subspace's validated 39-signal model, JobScamScore's 25 flags, and Inteller's 30+ signals - **V4 code audit:** Documented 10 bugs and differences between original and V4 extension - **V4 promoted to main:** Aaron's v4 rewrite is now the active version; original kept as backup - **8 new signals decided:** No salary rang

memory:memory/2026-04-04.md:36:73.snippet: ### 💡 Major Pivot Decisions - **New primary project:** GhostJob (Ghost Job Detector SaaS) - **Strategy:** Dual-play with existing OpenClaw Skill - Skill: $29 one-time for DIY users (claw.hatchedpixel.com) - SaaS: $9/mo subscription for convenience (ghostjob.io) - **MVP approach:** Web app first, Chrome extension later - **Build method:** Lovable → GitHub → Vercel + Supabase + Stripe ### 📋 GhostJob Details - **Problem:** 43% of job postings are ghost jobs (no real hiring intent) - **Solution:** AI-powered "Ghost Score" (0-100) + red flag detection - **Tech:** LinkedIn scraper → scoring algorithm → dashboard - **Status:** Aaron building landing page in Lovable now - **Full plan saved:**
